allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path '\\''C:\\Users\\aradb\\tradeguard'\\'' -Recurse -Force -Depth 3 | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\''\(\\node_modules|\\\\.git|\\\\.next\)'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { $indent = \($_.FullName -split '\\''\\'\\'' | Measure-Object\).Count - \($pwd.Path -split '\\''\\'\\'' | Measure-Object\).Count; $name = $_.Name; if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { Write-Host \('\\'' '\\'' * $indent\) + '\\''├── '\\'' + $name + '\\''/'\\'' } else { Write-Host \('\\'' '\\'' * $indent\) + '\\''├── '\\'' + $name } }')

PowerShell($key = "sb_publishable_5uGTKjRqzn-nY-iOyaEP_A_J9ZDCBJF"; $headers = @{ "apikey" = $key; "Authorization" = "Bearer $key" }; $tables = @\("streaks", "ai_insights"\); foreach \($t in $tables\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://rsoymnthrmldpqwmvdzr.supabase.co/rest/v1/$t`?limit=0" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "$t : OK \($\($res.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "$t : MISSING \(404\)" } })

PowerShell($key = "sb_publishable_5uGTKjRqzn-nY-iOyaEP_A_J9ZDCBJF"; $h = @{ "apikey" = $key; "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; foreach \($t in @\("streaks","ai_insights","profiles"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://rsoymnthrmldpqwmvdzr.supabase.co/rest/v1/$t`?limit=0" -Headers $h -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "$t : EXISTS" } catch { Write-Output "$t : MISSING — $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($key = "sb_publishable_5uGTKjRqzn-nY-iOyaEP_A_J9ZDCBJF"; $h = @{ "apikey" = $key; "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://rsoymnthrmldpqwmvdzr.supabase.co/rest/v1/streaks?limit=0" -Headers $h -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Output "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; Write-Output "BODY: $body" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $key = "sb_publishable_5uGTKjRqzn-nY-iOyaEP_A_J9ZDCBJF"; $h = @{ "apikey" = $key; "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; foreach \($t in @\("streaks","ai_insights"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://rsoymnthrmldpqwmvdzr.supabase.co/rest/v1/$t`?limit=0" -Headers $h -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "✅ $t — EXISTS \(HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "❌ $t — STILL MISSING" } })
